assertions.description: 4-layer stackup correctly identified: F.Cu, In1.Cu, In2.Cu, B.Cu. copper_layers_used=4 accurate. Stackup shows prepreg-core-prepreg layering with correct KiCad 9 layer numbering (0=F.Cu, 4=In1.Cu, 6=In2.Cu, 2=B.Cu).
33 nets match schematic exactly. routing_complete=true, unrouted_net_count=0 correct. The 4-layer board is fully routed.

GND zone spanning F.Cu, B.Cu, and In1.Cu (3 copper layers) correctly detected as is_filled=true. fill_ratio=2.125 is physically correct: filled_area=1727.43mm2 is the sum of F.Cu (487.71) + B.Cu (532.79) + In1.Cu (706.93) fill areas, against outline_area=812.9mm2. Values > 1 are expected for multi-layer zones.

INCORRECT: Board outline not detected: board_outline.edge_count=0 and bounding_box=null, resulting in board_width_mm=null and board_height_mm=null. The Camera Board is a physically defined PCB but its Edge.Cuts layer data was not parsed. Board area and dimension calculations are unavailable.
